---
title: "The Extinction Crisis"
subtitle: "A Global Look at Threatened Species (IUCN Red List 2024)"
format:
  dashboard:
    nav-buttons: [github]
    github: https://github.com/johnstonjay03/Stat-408-Final-Project
    theme: [sandstone]
fig-width: 10
fig-asp: 0.5
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(scales)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-and-prep
#| message: false
#| warning: false

#Country-level data
country_raw <- read_csv("country_species.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

country <- country_raw |>
  rename(
    Country       = Name,
    Reptiles      = `Reptiles*`,
    Fishes        = `Fishes*`,
    Molluscs      = `Molluscs*`,
    Invertebrates = `Other Inverts*`,
    Plants        = `Plants*`,
    Fungi         = `Fungi*`,
    Chromists     = `Chromists*`,
    Total         = Total
  ) |>
  mutate(across(-Country, as.numeric))

#Table 3: species by class and threat status
table3_raw <- read_csv("table3.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

table3 <- table3_raw |>
  rename(
    Class         = Name,
    Extinct       = EX,
    ExtinctWild   = EW,
    CR            = CR,
    EN            = EN,
    VU            = VU,
    Threatened    = `Subtotal (threatened spp.)`,
    NearThreat    = `NT or LR/nt`,
    LeastConcern  = `LC or LR/lc`,
    DataDeficient = DD,
    Total         = Total
  ) |>
  filter(Class != "Total") |>
  mutate(across(-Class, ~ as.numeric(gsub(",", "", .x))))

# Major classes only
major_classes <- c("MAMMALIA","AVES","REPTILIA","AMPHIBIA",
                   "ACTINOPTERYGII","CHONDRICHTHYES","INSECTA",
                   "GASTROPODA","MAGNOLIOPSIDA","LILIOPSIDA","CYCADOPSIDA")

table3_major <- table3 |>
  filter(Class %in% major_classes) |>
  mutate(Class = recode(Class,
    MAMMALIA       = "Mammals",
    AVES           = "Birds",
    REPTILIA       = "Reptiles",
    AMPHIBIA       = "Amphibians",
    ACTINOPTERYGII = "Ray-finned Fish",
    CHONDRICHTHYES = "Sharks & Rays",
    INSECTA        = "Insects",
    GASTROPODA     = "Gastropods",
    MAGNOLIOPSIDA  = "Flowering Plants",
    LILIOPSIDA     = "Monocots (Lilies etc.)",
    CYCADOPSIDA    = "Cycads"
  ))

#Top countries
top20 <- country |>
  arrange(desc(Total)) |>
  slice_head(n = 20)

most_threatened_count <- top20 |> slice(1) |> pull(Total)

#Long format for stacked plots
country_long <- country |>
  select(Country, Mammals, Birds, Reptiles, Amphibians,
         Fishes, Molluscs, Invertebrates, Plants, Fungi) |>
  pivot_longer(-Country, names_to = "Class", values_to = "Threatened") |>
  filter(!is.na(Threatened))

#Threat severity breakdown
severity <- table3_major |>
  select(Class, CR, EN, VU) |>
  pivot_longer(-Class, names_to = "Status", values_to = "Count") |>
  mutate(Status = factor(Status, levels = c("VU", "EN", "CR"),
                         labels = c("Vulnerable", "Endangered", "Critically Endangered")))

#Summary stats
total_threatened <- table3 |>
  summarise(total = sum(Threatened, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  pull(total)

total_extinct <- table3 |>
  summarise(total = sum(Extinct, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  pull(total)

pct_CR <- table3 |>
  summarise(cr = sum(CR, na.rm = TRUE), tot = sum(Threatened, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  mutate(p = round(cr / tot * 100, 1)) |>
  pull(p)

#World map data
world_sf <- sf::read_sf(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johan/world.geo.json/master/countries.geo.json",
  quiet = TRUE
)

map_data <- world_sf |>
  left_join(country |> select(Country, Total, Plants, Amphibians, Mammals),
            by = c("name" = "Country"))
```

# Overview

## Row {height="15%"}

```{r}
#| expandable: false
htmltools::div(
  style = "background:#1b4332; color:white; padding:14px 24px; border-radius:6px; font-family:sans-serif;",
  htmltools::span(style = "font-size:16px; font-weight:700;", "One in four assessed species faces extinction.   "),
  htmltools::span(
    style = "font-size:13px; opacity:0.85;",
    paste0(
      format(round(total_threatened), big.mark = ","),
      " species are currently threatened · ",
      format(round(total_extinct), big.mark = ","),
      " already extinct · ",
      pct_CR, "% of threatened species are Critically Endangered"
    )
  )
)
```

## Row {height="88%"}

### Column {width="55%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Top 20 Countries by Threatened Species"
#| warning: false

p <- top20 |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = reorder(Country, Total),
    y    = Total,
    fill = Total,
    text = paste0("<b>", Country, "</b><br>",
                  format(Total, big.mark = ","), " threatened species")
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#a7c4a0", high = "#1b4332", guide = "none") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Total Threatened Species") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )

ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(margin = list(l = 10, r = 20, t = 10, b = 40)) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="45%"}

```{r}
#| title: "About This Dashboard"

htmltools::div(
  style = "padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8;",
  htmltools::h4("What is the IUCN Red List?"),
  htmltools::p("The International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) Red List is the world's most authoritative source on the conservation status of species. Founded in 1964, it has assessed over 160,000 species across all kingdoms of life."),
  htmltools::hr(),
  htmltools::h4("What's in this dashboard?"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Overview:"), " Key global stats and top threatened countries."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("World Map:"), " Interactive choropleth showing threatened species by country."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("By Class:"), " Which animal and plant classes face the greatest risk?"),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Severity:"), " How many species are Vulnerable vs. Endangered vs. Critically Endangered?"),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Findings:"), " Key takeaways, caveats, and further reading.")
  ),
  htmltools::hr(),
  htmltools::h4("Data Sources"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li("IUCN Red List Summary Statistics, 2024 (Tables 3 & 5)"),
    htmltools::tags$li("Country-level species data: iucnredlist.org")
  ),
  htmltools::p(htmltools::em("STAT 408 · Spring 2026 · Jayden Johnston"),
               style = "color: #888; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 12px;")
)
```

#  World Map

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Threatened Species by Country — Hover to Explore"
#| warning: false

pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette  = c("#e8f5e9", "#a5d6a7", "#4caf50", "#2e7d32", "#1b4332"),
  domain   = map_data$Total,
  na.color = "#dddddd"
)

labels <- sprintf(
  "<strong>%s</strong><br/>
     Total threatened: <b>%s</b><br/>
     Plants: %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; Amphibians: %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; Mammals: %s",
  map_data$name,
  ifelse(is.na(map_data$Total), "No data",
         format(map_data$Total, big.mark = ",")),
  ifelse(is.na(map_data$Plants), "—", map_data$Plants),
  ifelse(is.na(map_data$Amphibians), "—", map_data$Amphibians),
  ifelse(is.na(map_data$Mammals), "—", map_data$Mammals)
) |> lapply(htmltools::HTML)

leaflet(map_data, height = 520) |>
  setView(lng = 10, lat = 15, zoom = 2) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor    = ~pal(Total),
    weight       = 0.7,
    color        = "#ffffff",
    fillOpacity  = 0.85,
    label        = labels,
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style     = list("font-weight" = "normal", padding = "6px 12px",
                       "border-radius" = "6px"),
      textsize  = "13px",
      direction = "auto"
    ),
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight       = 2,
      color        = "#1b4332",
      fillOpacity  = 0.95,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    "bottomright",
    pal       = pal,
    values    = ~Total,
    title     = "Threatened<br>Species",
    opacity   = 0.9,
    labFormat = labelFormat(big.mark = ",")
  )
```

## Row {height="35%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Top 10 Countries — Breakdown by Class"
#| warning: false

top10_long <- country_long |>
  filter(Country %in% top20$Country[1:10]) |>
  mutate(Country = factor(Country, levels = rev(top20$Country[1:10])))

colors10 <- c(
  Mammals = "#2d6a4f", Birds = "#40916c", Reptiles = "#52b788",
  Amphibians = "#74c69d", Fishes = "#95d5b2", Molluscs = "#b7e4c7",
  Invertebrates = "#d8f3dc", Plants = "#1b4332", Fungi = "#081c15"
)

p2 <- top10_long |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = Country,
    y    = Threatened,
    fill = Class,
    text = paste0(Country, " — ", Class, ": ", format(Threatened, big.mark = ","))
  )) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors10) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Threatened Species", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "right")

ggplotly(p2, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(legend = list(orientation = "v")) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

#  By Class

## Row

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Threatened Species Count by Major Class"
#| warning: false

p3 <- table3_major |>
  arrange(desc(Threatened)) |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = reorder(Class, Threatened),
    y    = Threatened,
    fill = Threatened,
    text = paste0("<b>", Class, "</b><br>",
                  format(Threatened, big.mark = ","), " threatened species<br>",
                  format(Extinct, big.mark = ","), " already extinct")
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#74c69d", high = "#b91c1c", guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Threatened Species") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

ggplotly(p3, tooltip = "text") |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Proportion of Each Class That Is Threatened vs. Least Concern"
#| warning: false

threat_pct <- table3_major |>
  mutate(
    pct_threatened = Threatened / Total * 100,
    pct_safe       = LeastConcern / Total * 100,
    pct_other      = 100 - pct_threatened - pct_safe
  ) |>
  select(Class, pct_threatened, pct_safe, pct_other) |>
  pivot_longer(-Class, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Pct") |>
  mutate(
    Category = recode(Category,
      pct_threatened = "Threatened",
      pct_safe       = "Least Concern",
      pct_other      = "Near Threatened / DD"
    ),
    Category = factor(Category,
      levels = c("Threatened", "Near Threatened / DD", "Least Concern"))
  )

p4 <- threat_pct |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = reorder(Class, -Pct * (Category == "Threatened")),
    y    = Pct,
    fill = Category,
    text = paste0(Class, "<br>", Category, ": ", round(Pct, 1), "%")
  )) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Threatened"           = "#b91c1c",
    "Near Threatened / DD" = "#f59e0b",
    "Least Concern"        = "#4ade80"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(scale = 2)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "% of Assessed Species", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

ggplotly(p4, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(legend = list(orientation = "h"
                       , y = -0.3
                       )) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row {height="35%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Assessed Species Summary Table"
#| warning: false

table3_major |>
  select(Class, Extinct, CR, EN, VU, Threatened, NearThreat, LeastConcern, Total) |>
  arrange(desc(Threatened)) |>
  rename(
    `Critically Endangered` = CR,
    `Endangered`            = EN,
    `Vulnerable`            = VU,
    `Near Threatened`       = NearThreat,
    `Least Concern`         = LeastConcern,
    `Total Threatened`      = Threatened
  ) |>
  datatable(
    options = list(
      dom        = "t",
      paging     = FALSE,
      scrollY    = "220px",
      columnDefs = list(list(className = "dt-right", targets = 1:8))
    ),
    rownames = FALSE
  ) |>
  formatCurrency(columns = 2:9, currency = "", digits = 0, mark = ",") |>
  formatStyle(
    "Total Threatened",
    background         = styleColorBar(range(table3_major$Threatened), "#fca5a5"),
    backgroundSize     = "100% 90%",
    backgroundRepeat   = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  ) |>
  formatStyle(
    "Critically Endangered",
    color      = styleInterval(200, c("black", "#b91c1c")),
    fontWeight = "bold"
  )
```

#  Threat Severity

## Row

### Column {width="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "CR / EN / VU Breakdown by Class"
#| warning: false

p5 <- severity |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = reorder(Class, Count),
    y    = Count,
    fill = Status,
    text = paste0(Class, "<br>", Status, ": ", format(Count, big.mark = ","))
  )) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Vulnerable"            = "#fbbf24",
    "Endangered"            = "#f97316",
    "Critically Endangered" = "#dc2626"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of Species", fill = "Threat Status") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

ggplotly(p5, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.3)) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="35%"}

```{r}
#| title: "What the IUCN Categories Mean"

htmltools::div(
  style = "padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.2;",
  htmltools::div(
    style = "background:#fef2f2; border-left:4px solid #dc2626; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; margin-bottom:12px;",
    htmltools::strong("Critically Endangered"), htmltools::br(),
    "Faces an extremely high risk of extinction. Population often declined 80–90%+ or fewer than 250 mature individuals remain."
  ),
  htmltools::div(
    style = "background:#fff7ed; border-left:4px solid #f97316; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; margin-bottom:12px;",
    htmltools::strong("Endangered"), htmltools::br(),
    "Faces a very high risk of extinction. Population decline of 50–70%+ over 10 years, or fewer than 2,500 mature individuals."
  ),
  htmltools::div(
    style = "background:#fffbeb; border-left:4px solid #fbbf24; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; margin-bottom:12px;",
    htmltools::strong("Vulnerable"), htmltools::br(),
    "Faces a high risk of extinction. Population decline of 30–50%+ or fewer than 10,000 mature individuals with continuing decline."
  ),
  htmltools::div(
    style = "background:#f0fdf4; border-left:4px solid #4ade80; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;",
    htmltools::strong("Extinct"), htmltools::br(),
    "No reasonable doubt that the last individual has died. As of 2024, 935+ species are confirmed extinct."
  )
)
```

## Row {height="35%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Critically Endangered as % of Each Class's Threatened Total"
#| warning: false

cr_pct <- table3_major |>
  mutate(pct_cr = CR / Threatened * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(pct_cr))

p6 <- cr_pct |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x    = reorder(Class, pct_cr),
    y    = pct_cr,
    fill = pct_cr,
    text = paste0(Class, ": ", round(pct_cr, 1), "% are Critically Endangered")
  )) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(cr_pct$pct_cr), linetype = "dashed",
             color = "#666", linewidth = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#fde68a", high = "#991b1b", guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "% Critically Endangered (of threatened)",
       caption = "Dashed line = average across shown classes") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

ggplotly(p6, tooltip = "text") |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

#  Findings

## Row

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Key Findings"

htmltools::div(
  style = "padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.9;",
  htmltools::h4("waiting to add key findings")
)
```

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Caveats & Further Reading"

htmltools::div(
  style = "padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.9;",
  htmltools::h4("Important Caveats"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li("waiting to add")
  ),
  htmltools::hr(),
  htmltools::h4("Further Reading"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::a("IUCN Red List — iucnredlist.org", href = "https://www.iucnredlist.org", target = "_blank")),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::a("IUCN Red List Categories & Criteria", href = "https://www.iucnredlist.org/resources/categories-and-criteria", target = "_blank")),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::a("WWF Living Planet Report 2024", href = "https://www.worldwildlife.org/pages/living-planet-report", target = "_blank")),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::a("Global Biodiversity Framework (CBD)", href = "https://www.cbd.int/gbf", target = "_blank")),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::a("State of the World's Amphibians", href = "https://www.amphibianark.org", target = "_blank"))
  ),
  htmltools::hr(),
  htmltools::h4("R Packages Used"),
  htmltools::p("tidyverse, plotly, leaflet, DT, sf, scales"),
  htmltools::hr(),
)
```
